message:
fix(fr-store): align string dump restore encoding

Close frankenredis-lxda.

 {"id":"frankenredis-lwt8","title":"Freeze requirepass PSYNC admission gate","description":"Porting/conformance parity round from docs/THREAT_MODEL.md: rogue replica injection notes still call out unauthenticated PSYNC as residual risk. Add TCP coverage proving a FrankenRedis primary with requirepass rejects unauthenticated PSYNC/replica handshakes, accepts AUTH first, and update the threat note if the implemented behavior is already covered.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T02:12:33.656868948Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T02:16:48.139775170Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T02:16:48.137984891Z","close_reason":"Added TCP coverage for requirepass-protected PSYNC admission and reconciled threat model","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"frankenredis-lxda","title":"v8s5 part b: upstream-compatible DUMP/RESTORE for STRING type","description":"First code slice of v8s5. Re-shape Store::dump_key + restore_key for STRING values only to use the upstream payload envelope:
  * RDB_TYPE_STRING (0) or RDB_TYPE_STRING with LZF (3) depending on size.
  * Length-prefixed bytes (upstream variable-length encoding, reuse fr-persist::rdb_encode_length + rdb_encode_string).
  * Trailer: version u16 LE (pin to 11 to match vendored 7.2.4) + CRC64 u64 LE.
  * Restore accepts both legacy frankenredis-internal format AND upstream format for one release (feature-flag).
  * Round-trip gate: DUMP from frankenredis → RESTORE on vendored redis-server → GET must match.
  * Reverse: DUMP from vendored → RESTORE to frankenredis → GET must match.

Blocks v8s5-c (container types).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-24T00:17:59.375447649Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T00:17:59.375447649Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"frankenredis-lxda","title":"v8s5 part b: upstream-compatible DUMP/RESTORE for STRING type","description":"First code slice of v8s5. Re-shape Store::dump_key + restore_key for STRING values only to use the upstream payload envelope:
  * RDB_TYPE_STRING (0) or RDB_TYPE_STRING with LZF (3) depending on size.
  * Length-prefixed bytes (upstream variable-length encoding, reuse fr-persist::rdb_encode_length + rdb_encode_string).
  * Trailer: version u16 LE (pin to 11 to match vendored 7.2.4) + CRC64 u64 LE.
  * Restore accepts both legacy frankenredis-internal format AND upstream format for one release (feature-flag).
  * Round-trip gate: DUMP from frankenredis → RESTORE on vendored redis-server → GET must match.
  * Reverse: DUMP from vendored → RESTORE to frankenredis → GET must match.

 {"id":"frankenredis-lze","title":"Reconcile residual auth drift note with current ACL baseline","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"docs","created_at":"2026-03-28T14:14:18.402061978Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-28T14:15:10.288622527Z","closed_at":"2026-03-28T14:15:10.288317950Z","close_reason":"Reconciled residual auth drift note with current ACL baseline","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-m047","title":"test(store): add metamorphic coverage for stream dump-restore invariants","description":"The fr-store metamorphic DUMP/RESTORE suite now covers strings, lists, sets, hashes, sorted sets, and BusyKey atomicity, but not the stream encoder/decoder path. Add property coverage that seeds bounded stream entry sequences with optional TTL, restores from self-generated DUMP payloads, asserts entry/id parity and stable re-encoding, and closes the bead with durable JSONL only.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-22T22:19:00.472210155Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T22:21:04.344862427Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T22:21:04.343025718Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-m17o","title":"v8s5 part d: upstream-compatible DUMP/RESTORE for STREAM + MIGRATE integration test","description":"Extend DUMP/RESTORE to cover STREAM values (RDB_TYPE_STREAM_LISTPACKS_3 = 21 at the DUMP-payload level; depends on s5su-e for the encoder). Then exercise the full loop:

  * MIGRATE host port key dest-db timeout from frankenredis → vendored redis-server moves the key end-to-end.
  * MIGRATE in reverse moves the key back.
  * COPY from one frankenredis DB to another uses the same pipeline internally.
  * XINFO STREAM FULL on the destination matches the source after each hop.

Closes v8s5 acceptance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-24T00:17:59.895967288Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T00:17:59.895967288Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
